title: Fast Container Placement
description: Just one command to place items in bulk to a designated container!
body:
This is a practical mod designed to solve the pain point of players repeatedly adding the same item to multiple containers. With a simple command, you can quickly place a preset number of items into a preset container block in a designated area, significantly improving game efficiency and eliminating the tedious manual placement process!
# Command Format:
> ## 1.0.0 or later
> > Placed from the user's inventory onto a chest.
/placetocontainer <start position> <end position> <container ID> <item ID> <quantity>
> ## 1.1.0 or later
> > Placed from the designated player's inventory onto a chest.
/placetocontainer <start position> <end position> <container ID> <item ID> <quantity> <player ID>

> > Placed from the designated container's inventory onto a chest.
/placetocontainer <start position> <end position> <container ID> <item ID> <quantity> <container position>
